page.title: Template:Country data United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland

revision.comment: per edit request on talk page - update flag and link aliases
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland | shortname alias = United Kingdom | flag alias = Flag of the United Kingdom.svg | flag alias-civil = Civil Ensign of the United Kingdom.svg | flag alias-government = Government Ensign of the United Kingdom.svg | flag alias-RFA = Government Service Ensign.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of the United Kingdom.svg | link alias-naval = {{#switch:{{{variant|}}} | civil = Merchant Navy (United Kingdom){{!}}Merchant Navy | RFA = Royal Fleet Auxiliary | #default = Royal Navy }} | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Royal Flying Corps.svg | link alias-air force = Royal Flying Corps | flag alias-army = Flag of the United Kingdom (3-5).svg | link alias-army = British Army | flag alias-1801 = Flag of the United Kingdom (WFB 2000).svg | flag alias-marines = Flag of the Royal Marines.svg | link alias-marines = Royal Marines | flag alias-navy = Naval Ensign of the United Kingdom.svg | link alias-navy = Royal Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = civil | var2 = government | var3 = RFA | var4 = 1801 | redir1 = UKGBI | related1 = United Kingdom | related2 = Kingdom of Great Britain | related3 = British Empire </noinclude> }}<noinclude> </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland | shortname alias = United Kingdom | flag alias = Flag of the United Kingdom.svg | flag alias-civil = Civil Ensign of the United Kingdom.svg | flag alias-government = Government Ensign of the United Kingdom.svg | flag alias-RFA = Government Service Ensign.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of the United Kingdom.svg | link alias-naval = {{#switch:{{{variant|}}} | civil = Merchant Navy (United Kingdom){{!}}Merchant Navy | RFA = Royal Fleet Auxiliary | #default = Royal Navy }} | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Royal Flying Corps.svg | link alias-air force = Royal Flying Corps | flag alias-army = Flag of the United Kingdom (3-5).svg | link alias-army = British Army | flag alias-1801 = Flag of the United Kingdom (WFB 2000).svg | flag alias-marines = Flag of the Royal Marines.svg | link alias-marines = Royal Marines | flag alias-navy = Naval Ensign of the United Kingdom.svg | link alias-navy = Royal Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = civil | var2 = government | var3 = RFA | var4 = 1801 | redir1 = UKGBI | related1 = United Kingdom | related2 = Kingdom of Great Britain | related3 = British Empire </noinclude> }}<noinclude> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland | shortname alias = United Kingdom | flag alias = Flag of the United Kingdom.svg | flag alias-civil = Civil Ensign of the United Kingdom.svg | flag alias-government = Government Ensign of the United Kingdom.svg | flag alias-RFA = Government Service Ensign.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of the United Kingdom.svg | link alias-naval = {{#switch:{{{variant|}}} | civil = Merchant Navy (United Kingdom){{!}}Merchant Navy | RFA = Royal Fleet Auxiliary | #default = Royal Navy }} | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Royal Flying Corps.svg | link alias-air force = Royal Flying Corps | flag alias-army = Flag of the United Kingdom (3-5).svg | link alias-army = British Army | flag alias-1801 = Flag of the United Kingdom (WFB 2000).svg | flag alias-marines = Flag of the Royal Marines.svg | link alias-marines = Royal Marines | flag alias-navy = Naval Ensign of the United Kingdom.svg | link alias-navy = Royal Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = civil | var2 = government | var3 = RFA | var4 = 1801 | redir1 = UKGBI | related1 = United Kingdom | related2 = Kingdom of Great Britain | related3 = British Empire </noinclude> }}<noinclude> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland | shortname alias = United Kingdom | flag alias = Flag of the United Kingdom.svg | flag alias-civil = Civil Ensign of the United Kingdom.svg | flag alias-government = Government Ensign of the United Kingdom.svg | flag alias-RFA = Government Service Ensign.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of the United Kingdom.svg | link alias-naval = {{#switch:{{{variant|}}} | civil = Merchant Navy (United Kingdom){{!}}Merchant Navy | RFA = Royal Fleet Auxiliary | #default = Royal Navy }} | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Royal Flying Corps.svg | link alias-air force = Royal Flying Corps | flag alias-army = Flag of the United Kingdom (3-5).svg | link alias-army = British Army | flag alias-1801 = Flag of the United Kingdom (WFB 2000).svg | flag alias-marines = Flag of the Royal Marines.svg | link alias-marines = Royal Marines | flag alias-navy = Naval Ensign of the United Kingdom.svg | link alias-navy = Royal Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = civil | var2 = government | var3 = RFA | var4 = 1801 | redir1 = UKGBI | related1 = United Kingdom | related2 = Kingdom of Great Britain | related3 = British Empire </noinclude> }}<noinclude> </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_United_Kingdom_of_Great_Britain_and_Ireland here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_United_Kingdom_of_Great_Britain_and_Ireland for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland | shortname alias = United Kingdom | flag alias = Flag of the United Kingdom.svg | flag alias-civil = Civil Ensign of the United Kingdom.svg | flag alias-government = Government Ensign of the United Kingdom.svg | flag alias-RFA = Government Service Ensign.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of the United Kingdom.svg | link alias-naval = {{#switch:{{{variant|}}} | civil = Merchant Navy (United Kingdom){{!}}Merchant Navy | RFA = Royal Fleet Auxiliary | #default = Royal Navy }} | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Royal Flying Corps.svg | link alias-air force = Royal Flying Corps | flag alias-army = Flag of the United Kingdom (3-5).svg | link alias-army = British Army | flag alias-1801 = Flag of the United Kingdom (WFB 2000).svg | flag alias-marines = Flag of the Royal Marines.svg | link alias-marines = Royal Marines | flag alias-navy = Naval Ensign of the United Kingdom.svg | link alias-navy = Royal Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = civil | var2 = government | var3 = RFA | var4 = 1801 | redir1 = UKGBI | related1 = United Kingdom | related2 = Kingdom of Great Britain | related3 = British Empire </noinclude> }}<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
